title: Infosys Announces Expansion of Mohali Development Center
detailed_summary: Infosys announced the expansion of its Mohali Development Center with a formal groundbreaking ceremony on March 12, 2026. The company plans to develop a new Software Development Block and supporting facilities with approximately 350,000 square feet of built-up area and seating for about 3,000 employees. Infosys said the expanded campus will strengthen its ability to design, co-create, and deploy AI-led enterprise solutions, enhance capabilities in cloud, AI, application development, and digital transformation, and support demand from global clients. Current Infosys Mohali operations employ close to 1,000 people and serve clients in Banking, Financial Services and Insurance, Retail, and Healthcare.

esg_or_csr_items.item: The new Mohali campus expansion is planned with energy-efficient building features, water-saving systems, 100% wastewater recycling using Membrane Bioreactor technology, green landscaping, eco-friendly construction materials, and smart building technologies.
